channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Norris defies orders and gives Piastri the Qatar sprint while Verstappen takes pole
item.description: Lando Norris ignored team orders as he handed his McLaren teammate Oscar Piastri the win the sprint race at the Qatar Grand Prix in a one-two finish for the team.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to watch the 49ers and the Bills on Sunday Night Football
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers battle the Buffalo Bills at 5:20 p.m. PDT on Sunday, Dec. 1 at Highmark Stadium in Orchard Park, N.Y.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Who is Blaire Fleming? SJSU volleyball player dominating female rivals and enraging women's rights groups
item.description: San Jose State volleyball player Blaire Fleming will play for a conference championship at the center of a political firestorm over transgender inclusion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia pulls out epic win in 8-overtime thriller, all but clinch spot in College Football Playoff
item.description: Georgia overcame a 14-point deficit with 5:37 left and defeated Georgia Tech in eight overtimes to all but clinch a spot in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tommy Edman agrees to $74 million, 5-year contract with Dodgers after helping win World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tommy Edman and the Los Angeles Dodgers agreed Friday to a $74 million, five-year contract. His new deal contains a team option for 2030 and includes $25 million deferred over 10 years. The agreement supersedes a $16.5 million, two-year contract he agreed to with St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers extend contract of postseason hero
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have agreed to a contract extension with one of the key pieces of the team's World Series title run. The Dodgers reached agreement Friday on a deal with Tommy Edman, ensuring that the do-it-all utility-man will remain with the team for the foreseeable future.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Halep dismayed at how Swiatek's doping case was handled compared to her own
item.description: Simona Halep, the former Wimbledon and French Open champion tennis player, has expressed dismay at the way Iga Swiatek's doping case was handled compared to her own.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SJSU 'disappointed' in Boise State's decision to forfeit playoff game against trans player
item.description: San Jose State University's women's volleyball team is in the Mountain West final, but the school is "disappointed" in how they got there.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers take advantage of frigid home-field elements in win against Dolphins
item.description: The Green Bay Packers took advantage of the elements at Lambeau Field against the Miami Dolphins to finish off the Thanksgiving tripleheader.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boise State withdraws from Mountain West volleyball tournament rather than play San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Boise State, which twice boycotted regular-season matches with San Jose State, pulled out of the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament Wednesday night even after securing a spot in the semifinals against the Spartans.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson not interested in bright spots with team's skid at 5 games going into Thanksgiving
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — Jaylon Johnson wasn't all that interested in discussing any bright spots or reasons to have hope for the Bears. The star cornerback made his feelings clear.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rays will play 19 of their first 22 games at home as MLB switches series to avoid summer rain
item.description: Major League Baseball switched a pair of series involving the Tampa Bay Rays to the first two months of the season in an attempt to avoid summer rain at open-air Steinbrenner Field, their temporary home following damage to Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
